allow:
Bash(/tmp/replace_sage.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Programming\\Projects\\Kwork\\GeneticTree\\frontend\\src' -Recurse -Filter '*.tsx' | ForEach-Object {
    $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw
    if \($content -match 'sage|#30A68E|#4DBFAA|#247E6C|48,166,142|glow-sage'\) {
        $content = $content -replace 'sage-dark', 'azure-dark'
        $content = $content -replace 'sage-light', 'azure-light'
        $content = $content -replace 'glow-sage', 'glow-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'shadow-sage', 'shadow-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'text-sage', 'text-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'bg-sage', 'bg-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'border-sage', 'border-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'from-sage', 'from-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'to-sage', 'to-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'via-sage', 'via-azure'
        $content = $content -replace 'ring-sage', 'ring-azure'
        $content = $content -replace '#30A68E', '#6BC4DD'
        $content = $content -replace '#4DBFAA', '#8FD4E8'
        $content = $content -replace '#247E6C', '#4FABC8'
        $content = $content -replace '48,166,142', '107,196,221'
        Set-Content $_.FullName $content -NoNewline
        Write-Host "Updated: $\($_.FullName\)"
    }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(git -C "C:\\Programming\\Projects\\Kwork\\GeneticTree" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Soft warm palette, tree theme support, generation labels, dashboard colors

- Tree editor: full light/dark theme support \(bg, sidebar, toolbar, SVG labels\)

- Generation select: descriptive labels \(Дети, Родители, Бабушки/Дедушки, etc.\)
- Dashboard: softer icon colors \(lavender, sage, dusty rose, muted blue\)
- Dashboard stats: matching soft palette for gender/status bars

EOF
\)")
